A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: HEDVersion
issueMessage: Field description: If HED tags are used:
The version of the HED schema used to validate HED tags for study.
May include a single schema or a base schema and one or more library schema.
Empty files not allowed.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: Description
issueMessage: Field description: Free-form natural language description.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SpatialReference
issueMessage: Field description: String or object describing the reference image to which the current image is aligned.
For images with a single reference, the value MUST be a single string.
For images with multiple references, such as surface and volume references,
a JSON object MUST be used.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.

issueMessage: Field description: Manufacturer of the equipment that produced the measurements.

issueMessage: Field description: Manufacturer's model name of the equipment that produced the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: DeviceSerialNumber
issueMessage: Field description: The serial number of the equipment that produced the measurements.
A pseudonym can also be used to prevent the equipment from being
identifiable, so long as each pseudonym is unique within the dataset.

issueMessage: Field description: Institution defined name of the machine that produced the measurements.

issueMessage: Field description: Manufacturer's designation of software version of the equipment that produced

subCode: MagneticFieldStrength
issueMessage: Field description: Nominal field strength of MR magnet in Tesla.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0087](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0087))
`Magnetic Field Strength`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ReceiveCoilName
issueMessage: Field description: Information describing the receiver coil.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 1250](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,1250))
`Receive Coil Name`,
although not all vendors populate that DICOM Tag,
in which case this field can be derived from an appropriate
private DICOM field.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ReceiveCoilActiveElements
issueMessage: Field description: Information describing the active/selected elements of the receiver coil.
This does not correspond to a tag in the DICOM ontology.
The vendor-defined terminology for active coil elements can go in this field.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MatrixCoilMode
issueMessage: Field description: (If used)
A method for reducing the number of independent channels by combining in
analog the signals from multiple coil elements.
There are typically different default modes when using un-accelerated or
accelerated (for example, `"GRAPPA"`, `"SENSE"`) imaging.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: CoilCombinationMethod
issueMessage: Field description: Almost all fMRI studies using phased-array coils use root-sum-of-squares
(rSOS) combination, but other methods exist.
The image reconstruction is changed by the coil combination method
(as for the matrix coil mode above),
so anything non-standard should be reported.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PulseSequenceType
issueMessage: Field description: A general description of the pulse sequence used for the scan.

Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0020](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0020))
`Scanning Sequence`.

`Sequence Name`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PulseSequenceDetails
issueMessage: Field description: Information beyond pulse sequence type that identifies the specific pulse
sequence used (for example,
`"Standard Siemens Sequence distributed with the VB17 software"`,
`"Siemens WIP ### version #.##,"` or
`"Sequence written by X using a version compiled on MM/DD/YYYY"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: NonlinearGradientCorrection
issueMessage: Field description: Boolean stating if the image saved has been corrected for gradient
nonlinearities by the scanner sequence.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MRAcquisitionType
issueMessage: Field description: Type of sequence readout.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0023](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0023))
`MR Acquisition Type`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: EchoTime
issueMessage: Field description: The echo time (TE) for the acquisition, specified in seconds.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0081](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0081))
`Echo Time`
(please note that the DICOM term is in milliseconds not seconds).
The data type number may apply to files from any MRI modality concerned with
a single value for this field, or to the files in a
[file collection](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/file-collections.md)
where the value of this field is iterated using the
[`echo` entity](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/entities.md#echo).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: DwellTime
issueMessage: Field description: Actual dwell time (in seconds) of the receiver per point in the readout
direction, including any oversampling.
For Siemens, this corresponds to DICOM field 0019, 1018 (in ns).
This value is necessary for the optional readout distortion correction of
anatomicals in the HCP Pipelines.
It also usefully provides a handle on the readout bandwidth,
which isn't captured in the other metadata tags.
Not to be confused with `"EffectiveEchoSpacing"`, and the frequent mislabeling
of echo spacing (which is spacing in the phase encoding direction) as
"dwell time" (which is spacing in the readout direction).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: FlipAngle
issueMessage: Field description: Flip angle (FA) for the acquisition, specified in degrees.
Corresponds to: [DICOM Tag 0018, 1314](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,1314))
`Flip Angle`.
The data type number may apply to files from any MRI modality concerned with
a single value for this field, or to the files in a
[file collection](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/file-collections.md)
where the value of this field is iterated using the
[`flip` entity](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/entities.md#flip).

Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0021](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0021))
`Sequence Variant`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SequenceName
issueMessage: Field description: Manufacturer's designation of the sequence name.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0024](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0024))
`Sequence Name`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PulseSequenceDetails
issueMessage: Field description: Information beyond pulse sequence type that identifies the specific pulse
sequence used (for example,
`"Standard Siemens Sequence distributed with the VB17 software"`,
`"Siemens WIP ### version #.##,"` or
`"Sequence written by X using a version compiled on MM/DD/YYYY"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: NonlinearGradientCorrection
issueMessage: Field description: Boolean stating if the image saved has been corrected for gradient
nonlinearities by the scanner sequence.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MRAcquisitionType
issueMessage: Field description: Type of sequence readout.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0023](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0023))
`MR Acquisition Type`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: EchoTime
issueMessage: Field description: The echo time (TE) for the acquisition, specified in seconds.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0081](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0081))
`Echo Time`
(please note that the DICOM term is in milliseconds not seconds).
The data type number may apply to files from any MRI modality concerned with
a single value for this field, or to the files in a
[file collection](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/file-collections.md)
where the value of this field is iterated using the
[`echo` entity](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/entities.md#echo).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: DwellTime
issueMessage: Field description: Actual dwell time (in seconds) of the receiver per point in the readout
direction, including any oversampling.
For Siemens, this corresponds to DICOM field 0019, 1018 (in ns).
This value is necessary for the optional readout distortion correction of
anatomicals in the HCP Pipelines.
It also usefully provides a handle on the readout bandwidth,
which isn't captured in the other metadata tags.
Not to be confused with `"EffectiveEchoSpacing"`, and the frequent mislabeling
of echo spacing (which is spacing in the phase encoding direction) as
"dwell time" (which is spacing in the readout direction).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: FlipAngle
issueMessage: Field description: Flip angle (FA) for the acquisition, specified in degrees.
Corresponds to: [DICOM Tag 0018, 1314](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,1314))
`Flip Angle`.
The data type number may apply to files from any MRI modality concerned with
a single value for this field, or to the files in a
[file collection](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/file-collections.md)
where the value of this field is iterated using the
[`flip` entity](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/entities.md#flip).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InstitutionName
issueMessage: Field description: The name of the institution in charge of the equipment that produced the
measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InstitutionAddress
issueMessage: Field description: The address of the institution in charge of the equipment that produced the
measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InstitutionalDepartmentName
issueMessage: Field description: The department in the institution in charge of the equipment that produced
the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: Description
issueMessage: Field description: Free-form natural language description.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SpatialReference
issueMessage: Field description: String or object describing the reference image to which the current image is aligned.
For images with a single reference, the value MUST be a single string.
For images with multiple references, such as surface and volume references,
a JSON object MUST be used.
Empty files not allowed.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.

issueMessage: Field description: Free-form natural language description.

subCode: Manufacturer
issueMessage: Field description: Manufacturer of the equipment that produced the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ManufacturersModelName
issueMessage: Field description: Manufacturer's model name of the equipment that produced the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: DeviceSerialNumber
issueMessage: Field description: The serial number of the equipment that produced the measurements.
A pseudonym can also be used to prevent the equipment from being
identifiable, so long as each pseudonym is unique within the dataset.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: StationName
issueMessage: Field description: Institution defined name of the machine that produced the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SoftwareVersions
issueMessage: Field description: Manufacturer's designation of software version of the equipment that produced
the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MagneticFieldStrength
issueMessage: Field description: Nominal field strength of MR magnet in Tesla.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 0087](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,0087))
`Magnetic Field Strength`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ReceiveCoilName
issueMessage: Field description: Information describing the receiver coil.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 1250](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,1250))
`Receive Coil Name`,
although not all vendors populate that DICOM Tag,
in which case this field can be derived from an appropriate
private DICOM field.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ReceiveCoilActiveElements
issueMessage: Field description: Information describing the active/selected elements of the receiver coil.
This does not correspond to a tag in the DICOM ontology.
The vendor-defined terminology for active coil elements can go in this field.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MatrixCoilMode
issueMessage: Field description: (If used)
A method for reducing the number of independent channels by combining in
analog the signals from multiple coil elements.
There are typically different default modes when using un-accelerated or
accelerated (for example, `"GRAPPA"`, `"SENSE"`) imaging.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: CoilCombinationMethod
issueMessage: Field description: Almost all fMRI studies using phased-array coils use root-sum-of-squares
(rSOS) combination, but other methods exist.
The image reconstruction is changed by the coil combination method
(as for the matrix coil mode above),
so anything non-standard should be reported.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PulseSequenceType
issueMessage: Field description: A general description of the pulse sequence used for the scan.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.

`Scanning Sequence`.
